title: Heininger HitchMate Cargo Stabilizer Bar and Cargo Bag Combo
description:
The Heininger HitchMate Cargo Stabilizer Bar and Cargo Bag Combo is great for truck owners to organize their cargo. The Cargo Stabilizer Bar is a helpful tool to keep cargo organized and contained, while the Cargo Bag fits onto the Bar and offers further options for mobile storage. Looking for a great way to keep your cargo secure and in place? This HitchMate Cargo Stabilizer Bar is your solution. This Commercial Grade bar is the strongest Cargo Bar on the market. Whether you are moving or working, the Stabilizer Bar easily secures a load for travel across town or cross-country. The ratcheting style handle allows for quick and easy adjustment. A security latch must be activated to release the bar. With rubber feet the cargo bar will grip tightly and won't leave a scratch

Heininger HitchMate Cargo Stabilizer Bar and Cargo Bag Combo

The Heininger HitchMate Cargo Stabilizer Bar and Cargo Bag Combo is great for truck owners to organize their cargo. The Cargo Stabilizer Bar is a helpful tool to keep cargo organized and contained, while the Cargo Bag fits onto the Bar and offers further options for mobile storage.

Key Features

  • Universal fit for all full-size Trucks
  • Heavy-duty ratcheting system adjust and expands 59"-73"
  • Rubber feet will not scrape the cargo area and secures cargo bar tightly to wall of vehicle
  • Built strong for tough loads
  • Cargo Bag included

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 4021A4016
  • UPC: 616588532316
  • Color: Black
  • Size: Large

Looking for a great way to keep your cargo secure and in place? This HitchMate Cargo Stabilizer Bar is your solution. This Commercial Grade bar is the strongest Cargo Bar on the market. Whether you are moving or working, the Stabilizer Bar easily secures a load for travel across town or cross-country. The ratcheting style handle allows for quick and easy adjustment.

A security latch must be activated to release the bar. With rubber feet the cargo bar will grip tightly and won't leave a scratch. This bar adjusts from 59" to 73" and fits full-size trucks.

The HitchMate Cargo Bed Bag by Heininger Automotive is the ideal cargo containment solution for the pick up truck owner who needs to add a little organization to the back of their truck. The Cargo Bag is made for heavy duty use and to withstand the elements in the back of any pickup truck in any weather condition. The BedBeg has 2" reinforced attachment straps to securely hold itself in place. Ideal for sports equipment and groceries alike.
